name: Coca-Cola Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
------------------------------COCA-COLA SYRUP------------------------------
3/4 cup sugar
2 tablespoons cocoa
6 tablespoons Coca-Cola
6 tablespoons butter
1 tablespoon light corn syrup
1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract
Mix all the dry ingredients together. Beat the eggs well; add sugar, oil, 3/4 cup cola, and vanilla extract, beating well. Stir in the dry ingredients until smooth, then add the carrots, nuts, and coconut. Mix well. Bake in a greased and lightly floured 13 x 9 pan in a preheated 350°F oven for 40-50 minutes, until cake tests done. Remove from oven and prick hot cake all over with a fork. Pour the cola syrup slowly, evenly over the top. Serve warm or at room temperature with lightly sweetened-vanilla flavored whipped cream.
